definition: An estimated $80-120B in Japanese CLO AAA holdings creates a channel linking BOJ normalization to US leveraged loan liquidity. Each 25bp BOJ hike narrows hedged carry pickup by ~15-20bp, potentially reducing demand and constraining CLO formation.
evidence: Each 25bp BOJ hike narrows hedged carry by ~15-20bp
Reduced demand → wider CLO liability spreads → compressed arbitrage → slower formation
Japanese institutions historically slow to reduce US asset exposure
open_questions: Precise sizing of Japanese CLO holdings is difficult to verify
How quickly would Japanese institutions reduce exposure?
BOJ normalization track record of non-materialization (actual repatriation ~30% of model-predicted)
